query: I trained a ResNet-50 on a 10-class subset of ImageNet. I'm shipping it where some inputs will not belong to those 10 classes. I have a candidate OOD test set of 10 OTHER ImageNet classes plus a CIFAR-100 set. Help me evaluate an OOD detector for this deployment.
expected_behavior: Identifies the 10-other-ImageNet-classes set as near-OOD and the CIFAR-100 set as far-OOD, and recommends evaluating and REPORTING the two separately rather than averaging or only reporting one
Recommends a method beyond max-softmax-probability (e.g., energy score, Mahalanobis on penultimate features, KNN distance, or ODIN) for the OOD score — does not stop at MSP as the proposed default
Names at least one OOD-specific evaluation metric beyond plain accuracy (AUROC, AUPR-out, or FPR-at-95-TPR) and applies it per OOD set rather than reporting only in-distribution test accuracy
